summary: This release includes Issue Management V2, Outgoing Data Validation feature, Ad-hoc Data Export download functionality, and several smaller enhancements and fixes.

updates.title: Issue Management V2
updates.body: Now supports auto resolved issues, bulk actions and new filters, with audit logs.

updates.title: Outgoing Data Validation
updates.body: New feature to review, approve, or reject Data Export extracts before delivery to data partners.

updates.title: Data Export Adhoc Download
updates.body: Download a Data Export extract on demand without affecting its scheduled run.

updates.title: Data Export Review Config
updates.body: New Config "Auto/Manual" review added to decide if each extract run should be manually validated or not.

updates.title: Data Export SFTP Configs
updates.body: Added a SFTP Delivery-Related section (SFTP destination, retry attempts) to Data Export config creation.

updates.title: Program Brand Milestone Grace Period Anchor
updates.body: Added a Grace Period Anchor (Earliest/Latest) field to the reference table.

updates.title: MA Pages Refresh Button
updates.body: Added a refresh button to reload data without losing filters.

updates.title: Data Export
updates.body: Fixed catalog ordering, editing scheduler post-start-date, and fixed config audit history.

updates.title: Data Ingest Crx-Internal Tab
updates.body: Added the separate Crx-Internal tab on Data Ingest page.
